name: Manison #20
description: Al-Naaim, 'The Ostriches,' ruled by Jupiter, is associated with speed, wildness, and the taming of untamed forces. Particularly favorable for working with animals and achieving rapid movement. The ostriches of the desert, represented by stars in Sagittarius, symbolize swiftness and the ability to escape danger. The generative artwork renders these swift stars in Jupiter's expansive purple-gold palette with dynamic, racing geometric patterns representing speed, freedom, and wild vitality.

attributes.value: Taming animals, swift travel, escaping danger, training, racing
